AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
REPLACE [[5774682069758874195]] WITH {
     readonly property ~&197088788&~ ~&5774682069758874195&~:2*~&5840248778396640108&~ + 2*~&8260768964620614264&~
 }
 REPLACE [[5840248778396640108]] WITH {
 readonly property ~&197088788&~ ~&5840248778396640108&~: 30
 }
REPLACE [[12535796974225705405]] WITH {
    property ~&197088788&~ ~&12535796974225705405&~: ~&6028015648323172598&~ ? 65 : 50 /* see MainWindow::onCompleted*/
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
